## Change Type

## PR Scope Check

- [ ] This PR has one review perspective.
- [ ] This PR does not mix live wiring and seam-only preparation.
- [ ] This PR does not mix dependency updates with application logic.
- [ ] If this is an umbrella PR, it is marked Draft and not intended for direct merge.
